§7Guide Book #46§r
§lSkeleton Golden Swordman§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Skeleton, Undead, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: All overworld surfaces, Underground.
•§lHealth§r: 20

•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25

tamed mobs.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Draped in gold and armed with gleaming blades, the Skeleton Golden Swordman is a lavish echo of ancient vanity turned deadly.
